About me

For 8 years I have been doing what I like, I started with regular HTML/CSS, at first I worked in companies that were mainly engaged in layout (EXSY). At the same time I studied Java Script, wrote small scripts, and more and more went into writing scripts at work, For 1 years I have made about 30 small and different projects. During this time, I have well pumped skills in HTML / CSS, got acquainted with LESS, SCSS preprocessors, also well acquainted with Java Script.

The next 3 years I worked in an outsourcing company (Attract Group), I started learning frameworks (Angular 1, React). But since the release of Angular 2, I have been using it for development. In the same company, I worked with NodeJs, Express, there were several projects on which I developed microservices. I tried myself as a Tech Lead and a mentor.

Last 3 years worked in product companies as a Front-End and Full-Stack developer. I wrote projects in Angular, Nest.Js and related technologies.

Work experience

Front-End (Tech Lead) at Monster Lead Group from May 2021 to June 2022

TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES: Angular 13, Angular-cli, RxJs, NGXS, Angular Material, FxLayout, Ag-Grid, Storybook, Jest

PROJECTS DESCRIPTION: - MLG offers mail-order marketing services in the United States. Our team was engaged in the transfer of this business to online services.
- This application is for clients who want to order mailing letters, it allows you to select templates, fill in data, select leads for mailing, calculate cost, terms.

RESPONSIBILITIES: - Architecture development of front-end applications and libraries
- Components and modules development
- Code review, mentoring

REASON FOR LEAVING: The company faced financial problems and directed efforts to another direction of business.

Full-Stack JavaScript Developer at iBuilt from September 2020 to May 2021

TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES: JS ES6, Angular 11, RxJs, Angular Material, Angular-cli, FxLayout, Storybook, Jasmine & Karma, NestJs, MongoDB

PROJECTS DESCRIPTION: iBUILT is a construction company based in NY city. We developed 2 internal products — DTP and GDS. DTP or Digital Twin Platform is a platform for management buildings such as residential complexes or hotels. The building owner has a digitized version of his property and can control and maintain its lifetime circle. GDS or Generative Design System is a SaaS that made it possible, according to the specified parameters, to generate a fully-featured building layout in Revit format for further construction.

RESPONSIBILITIES: - Development of front-end and back-end for DTP platform, mainly CRUD operations
- Front-end and backend development for GDS platform
- Development of a library for interacting with 3d models
- Development of a microservice for calculating costs and benefits from proposed buildings

REASON FOR LEAVING: The company stopped the development of the application.

Front-End Developer at Booking Health GmbH from October 2018 to August 2020

TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES: JS ES6, Angular 10, RxJs, Bootstrap, Angular-cli, GraphQL, NodeJs, NestJs, AWS S3, MongoDB

PROJECTS DESCRIPTION: - Booking Health is a medical company based in Germany
- It is a platform for registering users from different countries for medical examinations.
- In this system, users could then see the examination results such as MRT, X-ray, etc.

RESPONSIBILITIES: - Architecture development of front-end applications
- Development of the file manager library
- File manager API development with NodeJs
- Development of a library for viewing X-RAY and MRI

REASON FOR LEAVING: The project was released.

Front-End Developer at Attract Group from December 2015 to October 2018

TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES:HTML, CSS (LESS, SCSS), JavaScript (jQuery), Gulp, Webpack, AngularJs, Angular2+, TypeScript, Electron, Node.Js, Wordpress, Docker, Jenkins

PROJECTS DESCRIPTION: - Predominantly closed crm systems
- Task management system, the project was used by the company (similar to Jira) (Angular)
- Monolithic applications (HTML, CSS, JS + Laravel or Wordpress on the backend)
- Bots traders (working with cryptocurrency) (Node.Js + TypeScript)

RESPONSIBILITIES: - Layout of templates from PSD and other editors
- Development front-end applications on Angular
- Development microservices with NodeJs

REASON FOR LEAVING:Another company offered more favorable terms.

HTML/CSS Developer at EXSY from August 2014 to December 2015

TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES:HTML, CSS (LESS), JavaScript (jQuery)

PROJECTS DESCRIPTION: There were many projects (about 30), I can not single out any projects

RESPONSIBILITIES: - Layout of templates from PSD and other editors

REASON FOR LEAVING:Too many similar projects
